name: Coiled Rope Laundry Hamper - Brightroom™
description:
Simplify your laundry chores with this Coiled Rope Laundry Hamper from Brightroom™. This off-white laundry hamper showcases a coiled rope design and two cut-out handles with brown faux-leather grips for easy lifting and carrying from room to room. The open-top silhouette allows for quick and easy access when loading and unloading, while the deep oval shape provides ample space for holding dirty clothes, offering a clean aesthetic.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
